arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal: Agent reveals Barcelona rejected world-record bid for Spain star
arts.sum: A football agent reveals that Barcelona turned down a world-record bid for Lamine Yamal in the recent summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Gianluigi Donnarumma to miss PSG’s Champions League opener against Girona
arts.sum: PSG goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma (25) will miss Les Parisiens’ Champions League opener against La Liga side Girona on Wednesday, the Ligue 1 club has announced. The Italy international, whose wife…

arts.ttl: PSG's world record bid for Barcelona's Lamine Yamal confirmed by agent
arts.sum: "One thing I know for sure is that Barcelona did reject a big offer for Lamine Yamal from PSG some months ago," agent Andy Bara told Podcast Inkubator . It was reported early in the summer that PSG, in their search for a replacement for Kylian Mbappe, had proposed a deal worth a whopping €250m to sign the winger just days before his 17th birthday.

arts.ttl: Watch: 16-year-old Barcelona sensation scores again for Barca Atlétic
arts.sum: One of the most highly-regarded up-and-coming talents at La Liga giants Barcelona was on target once more on Sunday. The player in question? Toni Fernández. The name of youngster Fernández…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick hails ‘brilliant’ Barcelona star before Girona clash
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has this weekend moved to lavish praise on a leading member of the club’s attacking ranks. The player in question? Raphinha. Wide-man Raphinha is for…

arts.ttl: Dani Olmo’s agent confirms world-record bid for Barcelona star
arts.sum: The agent of Barcelona star Dani Olmo has confirmed that, over the summer, the Blaugrana were the recipients of a record-breaking transfer offer for a leading member of the club’s…

arts.ttl: Girona vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Girona host Barcelona in a Catalan derby on Sunday afternoon as Hansi Flick's side look to extend their winning start to the 2024/25 season. With or without Herrera, Oriol Romeu is set to line up in midfield against the side he represented last season, while former Manchester United men Daley Blind and Donny van de Beek may also start.

arts.ttl: Sunday's La Liga predictions including Girona vs. Barcelona
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Girona vs. Barcelona.

arts.ttl: When is Girona - Barcelona? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Despite losing key players during the summer, they’ve managed to collect seven points from their last three La Liga matches, including an impressive win over Sevilla. Barcelona, now under the guidance of Hansi Flick, have started season flawlessly, winning their first four games and sitting at the top of the La Liga standings.

arts.ttl: “I love his intensity” - Flick full of praise for Raphinha
arts.sum: Flick was asked about Raphinha’s form in a press conference on Saturday and refused to take the credit for the player’s transformation, instead choosing to praise the team as a whole for helping Raphinha bring his best to the pitch. Raphinha’s Player of the Month Award for August is perhaps the most satisfying of all given how much the Brazilian was criticized in his first two seasons and the complete transformation he has gone through under Flick’s leadership.
